description.name: AtomFleet Proxmox
description.tagline: WHMCS Proxmox suite with a provisioning module, admin dashboard, and D3.js client panel.
description.long: AtomFleet Proxmox packages a WHMCS server module for provisioning QEMU and LXC services plus an admin addon for cluster overview and IPv4 pool management, while keeping deep infrastructure control in Proxmox.
features: Automated IPv4 pool allocation and cloud-init delivery
Admin guest link repair and overview dashboard
